Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IndustriesSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IndustriesSettings2
public class IndustriesSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for IndustriesSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IndustriesSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
